case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JUAN CARLOS HERNANDEZ GARCIA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, JUAN CARLOS HERNANDEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS HERNANDEZ GARCIA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
